config.face-mouse.name: Face Mouse When Attack
config.face-mouse.tooltip: When enabled, the character will face the mouse direction when attacking
config.weapon-autoswing.name: Weapon Autoswing
config.weapon-autoswing.tooltip: When enabled, holding down the attack button will continuously use the weapon's light attack
config.enable-weapons.name: Allow Moving for Weapons
config.enable-weapons.tooltip: Whether to allow moving when using weapons
config.enable-tools.name: Allow Moving for Tools
config.enable-tools.tooltip: Whether to allow moving when using tools
config.controller-attack-mode.name: Right Stick Attack Mode
config.controller-attack-mode.tooltip:
Sets the right stick's control logic during attack:
- Mouse Aim: directly moves the mouse (same as default)
- Directional Attack: stick independently controls direction, press 'Use' to use weapon
- Edge Trigger: stick controls direction, auto-attack when pushed to the edge
'Face Mouse When Attack' must be enabled for directional control to work
'Weapon Autoswing' must be enabled for 'Edge Trigger' mode to function properly
config.controller-attack-dead-zone.name: Right Stick Attack Dead Zone
config.controller-attack-dead-zone.toolt: The stick must exceed this threshold to trigger an attack, preventing accidental inputs. Higher values require larger stick deflection.
config.controller-aim-dead-zone.name: Right Stick Aim Dead Zone
config.controller-aim-dead-zone.tooltip: Stick input below this threshold will keep the current facing direction, preventing frequent turning from minor drift. Higher values increase the lock-on range.
